productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Derby Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Referencing the classic derby boot, this pair of U.S. Polo Association shoes is a great formal wear option - they're hard wearing but look smart. Add a raffish feel to your on-duty ensemble with these shoes, they'll look good with denims, a tee and a plaid shirt. Product Details Brown derby shoe with perforations on the toe box, central lace-ups and a haul loop at the heel collar Padded tongue and inner Outsole adhered to the upper for durability TPU outsole with branded groove on the forefoot and a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine Style NoteReferencing the classic derby boot, this pair of U.S. Polo Association shoes is a great formal wear option - they're hard wearing but look smart.
